blockingIssues.description: Spacer-removal behavior is not achieved because SectionCard only suppresses body spacing for null/undefined/false children, while header-only ResultsStep callsites still pass empty <div /> children.
frontend/src/components/app/ResultsStep.tsx read-only header-only SectionCard still passes <div /> children, so the mt-5 body spacer remains.
frontend/src/components/app/ResultsStep.tsx save-result header-only SectionCard still passes <div /> children, so the mt-5 body spacer remains.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit transcript evidence of red→green ordering before frontend-worker handoffs can mark `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` as true.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of worker session 4d1e1639-1d17-4470-ad4c-cc5a5284a5a8 found ApplyPatch entries before the first targeted test run, while the handoff still reported procedure compliance.
